'''Veronian berry wine''' was a [[Wine/Legends|wine]] beverage on the market during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was considered one of the finest vintages in the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], though many imitations were available, including non-[[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] versions. It may have originated from the [[Veronia system/Legends|Veronia system]].
